name: Atlas Construction
mission: Deliver mid-rise and industrial developments on schedule without compromising site safety.
culture: Direct, deadline-driven, safety-first. Site engineers are expected to make defensible calls without waiting for sign-off on routine items.
projects: Al Marsa Logistics Hub (42,000 m² warehouse)
Meadow Ridge Residential Towers (2 x 18 floors)

name: UrbanBuild Engineering
mission: Bring Scandinavian-style design coordination discipline to fast-growing urban infill projects.
culture: Collaborative and BIM-first — clash detection happens weekly, not at the end.

name: Skyline Contractors
mission: High-rise general contracting with a reputation for holding the critical path.
culture: Planning-heavy. Every trade foreman gets a look-ahead schedule every Friday, no exceptions.

name: Prime Infrastructure
mission: Deliver highway and bridge infrastructure that survives monsoon-season stress tests.
culture: Rigorous QA/QC, heavy documentation, strong emphasis on materials testing.

name: Delta Civil
mission: Affordable housing at scale without cutting structural corners.
culture: Lean construction principles, tight cost control, resourceful field engineering.

name: Nova Engineering
mission: Industrial and mining-adjacent civil works built to withstand harsh operating conditions.
culture: Risk-assessment-first culture; nothing gets built without a method statement.

name: Caspian Structures
mission: Structural steel and reinforced concrete works for the South Caucasus energy and commercial sectors.
culture: Precision-driven; structural tolerances are treated as non-negotiable, drawings are the law.
